com.rays.common

    Package Description

  • Classes in com.rays.common used by com.rays.common 
    Class Description
    BaseDTO
    Base Data Transfer Object class providing common fields and functionality for all DTOs in the application.
    BaseForm
    Base Form class for handling request data binding and DTO initialization.
    BaseServiceInt
    Base Service Interface providing common business logic operations.
    DropdownList
    Interface for dropdown list options.
    ORSResponse
    Standard response wrapper for all REST API responses.
    UserContext
    User context holder containing information about the currently authenticated user.
  • Classes in com.rays.common used by com.rays.common.impl 
    Class Description
    BaseDAOInt
    Base Data Access Object interface providing common database operations.
    BaseDTO
    Base Data Transfer Object class providing common fields and functionality for all DTOs in the application.
    BaseServiceInt
    Base Service Interface providing common business logic operations.
    UserContext
    User context holder containing information about the currently authenticated user.

    Class Description
    BaseCtl
    Base controller class for common REST operations like search, save, get, delete.
    ORSResponse
    Standard response wrapper for all REST API responses.
